creator: homaei@corebox.ir
text:
(In reply to Faraz Vahedi from comment #8)

Happy now? did you read my CV?
This is my CV, all yours!!!
http://in4bsd.com/page/My%20CV

So you are officially threatening us to making an attack against, OK then, it's safe to say when you were trying to compromise my IRNIC-Handle, they got your IP address(gotcha). so next time, don't expose yourself (which is hetzner, ding dong ditch?). we know you are working for the government

I think you are a pathetic lier, who is trying to steal other's identities. 
This is over, but I just wondered if somebody else is reading this conversation.
The defense is with "s" by the way.
